items.name: Valeria M.
items.text: I've had the unlimited package for 6 months and it completely changed my routine. The classes are incredible and booking is effortless.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: How do I book a class?
items.answer: Browse the catalog, choose a class and time that works for you, and confirm your booking in a few steps. If it's your first time, we'll ask you to create a free account.

items.question: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
items.answer: Yes. You can manage your bookings from your personal dashboard. Cancellations are allowed at least 4 hours before the class.

items.question: What's included in the Wellness Kitchen?
items.answer: These are optional add-ons you can attach to your class booking or buy separately: functional smoothies, nutrition plans, supplements and wellness consultations.

items.question: Do packages expire?
items.answer: Yes, prepaid packages have an expiration date from the moment of purchase. You can check your credit balance and expiry date at any time from your account.

items.question: How many spots are available per class?
items.answer: Capacity varies by class and level. You can see real-time availability in the catalog. We recommend booking in advance.

items.question: Can I buy extras without an active package?
items.answer: Yes. Wellness Kitchen products and add-ons are available to any customer, with or without an active package.
